items.name: Palak Patta Chaat
items.description: Spinach leaves in a crispy lentil batter, topped with yoghurt, date & tamarind and chilli & mint sauce.

items.name: Aloo Tikki
items.description: Crispy spiced potato patties with chickpeas, mint, date & besan vermicelli.

items.name: Khasta Kachori & Peo
items.description: Crisp gol-gappa shell filled with white pea mash, tamarind, sweet yogurt and mint sauce.

items.name: Pattiwala Samosa
items.description: Crispy turnover deliciously filled with mildly spiced potatoes and green peas.

items.name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka
items.description: Marinated skewers of cubed cottage cheese, grilled in a super hot clay tandoor oven.

items.name: Spicy Chilli Paneer
items.description: Crispy chilli paneer made by tossing fried paneer in sweet, sour and spicy chilli sauce.

items.name: Pani Puri (10pcs)
items.description: Crispy fried balls of plain flour filled with a mixture of mashed potatoes, black chickpeas and served with tangy water.

items.name: Veg Platter for 2
items.description: Tandoori Paneer Tikka, Samosa, Aloo Tikki, Khasta Kachori.

items.name: Roasted Tandoori Chicken
items.description: Tandoori chicken marinated with garam masala, ginger, garlic, yogurt with fresh lemon.

items.name: Grilled Tandoori Chicken Tikka
items.description: Chicken thigh fillets marinated with yoghurt, lime pickle, ginger and fresh lime smoked in a tandoori oven.

items.name: Prawn Kaliwada
items.description: Tender prawns marinated in a zesty batter, deep-fried to a golden crisp, capturing the vibrant essence of Mumbai coastal cuisine.

items.name: Spicy Chilli Chicken
items.description: Crispy chicken tossed in a spicy chilli sauce.

items.name: Lemon Garlic Lamb Chops
items.description: Lamb cutlets marinated with spice, ginger and garlic, and cooked to perfection in the tandoor.

items.name: Crab Pitta
items.description: Crab meat mixed with rice flour, coconut, and South Indian spices.

items.name: Spicy Chilli Prawns, Scallops & Calamari
items.description: Prawn, scallops & calamari cooked in chilli sauce.

items.name: Famous Gilafi Seekh Kebab
items.description: Skewered lamb mince, glazed with coriander, mint, green chilli, then cooked in the tandoor and served with mint chutney.

items.name: Punjabi Fish Fry
items.description: Fish marinated in medium-spicy batter, then fried till crispy - a famous dish from the streets of Amritsar.

items.name: Platter for 2
items.description: Grilled Tandoori Chicken Tikka, Gilafi Seekh Kebab, Punjabi Fish Fry, Prawn Kaliwada.

items.name: Chicken & Cheese Dosa
items.description: Light & crisp rice flour pancake served with sambhar & a filling of chicken and cheese.

items.name: Chowmein
items.description: Noodles with mixed vegetables and special homemade sauce.

items.description: Veg or Chicken.

items.description: Our signature dish - cubes of cottage cheese cooked in the Chef's special velvety smooth gravy - a must try!

items.name: Palak Paneer

items.description: Chickpeas cooked with traditional herbs & spices.

items.description: A mix of yellow lentils cooked with cumin seeds, ginger and garlic, and fresh tomato sauce.

items.name: Chicken Lababdar
items.description: Our signature dish - chicken tikka cooked in the Chef's special velvety smooth gravy - a must try!

items.description: Chicken cooked with mango pulp & coconut cream.

items.description: Boneless diced lamb with almond & cashew paste, with a touch of fresh cream.

items.description: A traditional South Indian dish with coconut and fresh tamarind, mustard and dry red chilli.

items.description: A rich mildly spiced curry with roasted sesame, coconut, & peanuts, offering a nutty & aromatic flavour with tender pieces of lamb.

items.description: A spicy, tangy, & flavourful beef curry originating from Goa.

items.description: A rich mildly spiced curry with roasted sesame, coconut, & peanuts, offering a nutty & aromatic flavour with tender pieces of beef.

items.description: A traditional South Indian dish with coconut and fresh tamarind, mustard and dry red chilli.

items.description: Baby diced goat on the bone, cooked in a sauce made with fresh spinach, onions & spices.

items.description: A rich mildly spiced curry with roasted sesame, coconut, & peanuts, offering a nutty & aromatic flavour with tender pieces of goat.

items.description: Salmon fillet grilled in the tandoor, served with chips and garlic naan.

items.description: A traditional South Indian dish with coconut and fresh tamarind, mustard and dry red chilli.

items.description: Paneer Lababdar, Mix Veg curry, Dal Tadka, Rice, Roti, Pickle, Pappadam, Sweet.

items.name: Veg Banquet
items.description: Per person. Entrée: Palak Patta Chaat, Samosa, Onion Bhaji, Aloo Tikki. Mains: Paneer Lababdar, Aloo Gobi, Veg Korma, Daal Makhani. Rice/Naan and Side dishes. Dessert extra $3.50 per person (select any one: Gulab Jamun / Rasmalai / Kulfi Mango / Pista).

items.name: Non Veg Banquet
items.description: Per person. Entrée: Palak Patta Chaat, Chicken Tikka, Seekh Kebab, Aloo Tikki. Mains: Butter Chicken, Lamb Rogan Josh, Paneer Lababdar, Daal Makhani. Rice/Naan and Side dishes. Dessert extra $3.50 per person (select any one: Gulab Jamun / Rasmalai / Kulfi Mango / Pista).
